docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN (VP). DEFENDANT MICHAEL GARGARITIANO MARINAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF REQUEST A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
